converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Frederick Elisha Shapleigh papers
Shapleigh, Frederick Elisha, 1884-1968.
2454
3 cubic feet. 3 cubic feet.
1908-1920. Papers, correspondence, reports, sociological surveys, manuscripts. Papers of Frederick Elisha Shapleigh concerning his work in rural sociology and education. Collection material in English 2088214
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, April 2004
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Papers of Frederick Elisha Shapleigh concerning his work in rural sociology and education (1908-1914), including correspondence, reports, sociological surveys, and several of his manuscripts on the subjects; also papers relating to his work for the Public Education Association in Buffalo (1914-1920), including correspondence, statistical studies, a complete file of "School and Community" which he edited, and clippings.
Cite As:
Frederick Elisha Shapleigh papers, #2454. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Sociologists. Educators. Education, Rural. Sociology, Rural. Education -- New York (State) -- Buffalo. Public Education Association

Scope and Contents

Expenditures, Per Capita, for Schools
Expenditures by the U.S. Government for Various Purposes, 1914-1917

Woellner19197Handwritten Editorials for School and Community1919-19207School and Community, Complete FileDec. 4, 1919-Aug. 20, 19207Newspaper Clippings1914-19207Miscellaneous7Articles clipped from The School Board Journal1915-19198

College, Experience and Character Versus the Selection of Teachers, Oct. 1917
